subject: Your Google Account Security Alert
body:
Dear User,

We detected unusual activity on your Google Account. To protect your account, we have temporarily suspended access. Please verify your identity by clicking the link below to secure your account.

[Link to Verify Account]

If you do not verify your account within 24 hours, your account may be permanently deleted.

Sincerely,
The Google Security Team
red_flags: Sense of urgency/threat (account suspended, permanently deleted)
Suspicious link (not a direct Google domain, likely fake)
Request for immediate action to avoid negative consequences

subject: Urgent: Action Required for Your PayPal Account
body:
Dear PayPal User,

We have received a report of unauthorized activity on your PayPal account. For your security, we have temporarily limited access to your account. Please log in immediately to review your recent activity and confirm your identity.

[Link to Login]

Failure to do so may result in the permanent closure of your account.

Thank you for your cooperation.

PayPal Support
red_flags: Urgency and threat of account closure

subject: Invoice #INV12345 Attached
body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Please find attached Invoice #INV12345 for your recent purchase. Payment is due within 30 days.

Thank you for your business.

Sincerely,
Your Company Billing Department

subject: Your Computer Needs Immediate Attention!
body:
Your computer has been infected with a severe virus. To prevent data loss, you must download our system repair tool immediately. Click here to download: [Malicious Download Link]

If you do not act within the next hour, your personal files will be corrupted.
red_flags: Threat of severe consequences (data loss, file corruption)
Direct request to download software from an unknown source

subject: New Login Alert for Your Facebook Account
body:
Hi John,

A new device logged into your Facebook account today from an unknown location. If this wasn't you, please review your recent activity immediately and secure your account.

Review Activity: [Link to Fake Login Page]

We recommend changing your password if you do not recognize this activity.

Thanks,
Facebook Security Team
red_flags: Suspicious link that mimics Facebook's domain
Request to review activity and change password

subject: Weekly Digest: Latest Tech Trends
body:
Hello,

Here's your weekly digest of the latest in tech! This week, we cover AI advancements, new smartphone releases, and cybersecurity tips.

Read More: [Link to Blog Post]

Stay informed!

The Example Blog Team

subject: Job Offer: Senior Developer Position
body:
Dear Candidate,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Developer at Corporate Careers. Please review the attached offer letter and reply with your acceptance within 48 hours.

Offer Letter: [Attached Document]

We look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Human Resources Department

subject: Your Amazon Order #987-6543210 Has Shipped
body:
Great news! Your Amazon order #987-6543210 is on its way. You can track its progress here: [Link to Amazon Tracking]

Estimated delivery: [Date]

Thank you for shopping with Amazon.

subject: Urgent Security Update Required for Your Windows PC
body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our system has detected a critical security vulnerability on your Windows PC. To prevent potential data breaches, you must install the latest security patch immediately. Click the link below to download the update:

[Link to Malicious Update]

Failure to update within 12 hours will result in your system being locked.

Microsoft Support
red_flags: Urgency and threat of system lockout
Request to download software from an untrusted source

subject: Important Update Regarding Your Bank Account
body:
Dear Customer,

We are writing to inform you about a necessary update to our security protocols. To ensure uninterrupted service, please verify your account details by clicking the link below and logging in:

[Link to Fake Bank Login]

This action is required within 24 hours to avoid any disruption to your account.

Sincerely,
Your Bank Security Team
red_flags: Urgency and threat of account disruption
Request to verify personal information via a suspicious link

subject: Your Monthly Utility Bill
body:
Dear Customer,

Please find your monthly utility bill attached. Payment can be made online or by mail.

Bill: [Attached PDF]

Thank you for your prompt payment.

Sincerely,
Utility Company

subject: Your Apple ID Requires Immediate Verification
body:
Dear Apple User,

There has been suspicious activity associated with your Apple ID. For your security, we've temporarily disabled access to your account. Please click the link below to verify your identity and restore access:

[Link to Fake Apple Verification]

If verification is not completed within 1 hour, your account may be permanently suspended.

Regards,
Apple Support Team

subject: New Connection Request
body:
Hi Jane,

John Doe has sent you a connection request on LinkedIn.

View Profile: [Link to LinkedIn Profile]

Best regards,
The LinkedIn Team

subject: Your Upcoming Trip Confirmation - Flight #XYZ789
body:
Dear Traveler,

Your flight booking for Flight #XYZ789 is confirmed. Please find your itinerary attached.

Itinerary: [Attached Document]

We wish you a pleasant journey.

Sincerely,
Travel Agency

subject: Urgent: Your Loyalty Points Expire Tonight!
body:
Dear Member,

Your accumulated loyalty points are about to expire at midnight! To avoid losing them, please claim your reward by clicking the link below and entering your details:

[Link to Claim Reward]

Don't miss out on your valuable rewards!

Thank you,
Loyalty Program Team
red_flags: False sense of urgency ('expire tonight', 'Don't miss out')
Request for personal information to claim reward
